summary: There is no direct evidence linking methylphenidate treatment to the onset or worsening of skin picking phenomena. While stimulants may influence impulsivity and neural circuits associated with obsessive behaviors, these effects do not translate into established causative relationships with excoriating behaviors based on current research.
